title: Iran, FOMC, CLARITY ACT: Gold Under Pressure, Bitcoin Resilient
description: Three converging pressures are weighing on crypto prices: a deteriorating Iran situation, hawkish FOMC rhetoric, and declining legislative odds for the CLARITY Act. Despite this, digital assets have demonstrated notable resilience relative to other asset classes, according to CoinShares’ Research Department.  Flows: a divergent picture Digital asset ETPs recorded US$605M of outflows this week, breaking [...]The post Iran, FOMC, CLARITY ACT: Gold Under Pressure, Bitcoin Resilient appeared first on ETF Trends.
